en.text: a primitive root; to be spare or skeleton-like; used only as a denominative from H1634; (causative) to bone, i.e. denude (by extensive, craunch) the bones

senses.gloss_en: a primitive root; to be spare or skeleton-like; used only as a denominative from H1634; (causative) to bone, i.e. denude (by extensive, craunch) the bones
